name: Messenger.Component.PortableComponent

aliases.name: ConcretePortableComponent
aliases.comment:
ConcretePortableComponent

Used when createing a portable component.

Use `translatePortableComponent` to create a `ConcreteUserComponent` from a `ConcretePortableComponent`.

The `scenemsg` type is replaced by `()` because you cannot send changescene message.
aliases.type: { init : Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentInit userdata msg data, update : Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentUpdate data userdata tar msg scenemsg, updaterec : Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentUpdateRec data userdata tar msg scenemsg, view : Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentView userdata data, matcher : Messenger.GeneralModel.Matcher data tar }

aliases.name: PortableComponentStorage
aliases.comment: Portable component storage as a specific component type sugar
aliases.type: Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata -> gmsg -> Messenger.Component.Component.AbstractComponent cdata userdata gtar gmsg bdata scenemsg

aliases.name: PortableComponentUpdate
aliases.type: Messenger.Base.Env () userdata -> Messenger.Base.UserEvent -> data -> ( data, List.List (Messenger.GeneralModel.Msg tar msg (Messenger.Scene.Scene.SceneOutputMsg scenemsg userdata)), ( Messenger.Base.Env () userdata, Basics.Bool ) )

aliases.name: PortableComponentUpdateRec
aliases.type: Messenger.Base.Env () userdata -> msg -> data -> ( data, List.List (Messenger.GeneralModel.Msg tar msg (Messenger.Scene.Scene.SceneOutputMsg scenemsg userdata)), Messenger.Base.Env () userdata )

aliases.name: PortableMsgCodec
aliases.type: { encode : generalmsg -> specificmsg, decode : specificmsg -> generalmsg }

aliases.name: PortableTarCodec
aliases.type: { encode : generaltar -> specifictar, decode : specifictar -> generaltar }

values.name: genPortableComponent
values.comment: Generate abstract component from concrete component.
values.type: Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.ConcretePortableComponent data userdata tar msg scenemsg -> Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableTarCodec tar gtar -> Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableMsgCodec msg gmsg -> bdata -> Basics.Int -> Messenger.Component.PortableComponent.PortableComponentStorage cdata userdata gtar gmsg bdata scenemsg

aliases.name: BasicUpdater
aliases.comment:
Basic Update Type

A basic updater type used to update the basic data of the layer with event.

Users can use it as the first step of the update process
aliases.type: Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata -> Messenger.Base.UserEvent -> data -> ( data, List.List (Messenger.GeneralModel.Msg tar msg (Messenger.Scene.Scene.SceneOutputMsg scenemsg userdata)), ( Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata, Basics.Bool ) )

aliases.name: Distributor
aliases.comment:
Distributor Type

A distributor is used to generate several list of Component Msgs for corresponding components list.

The `cmsgpacker` is a custom type to store the component msgs and their targets.
aliases.type: Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata -> Messenger.Base.UserEvent -> data -> ( data, ( List.List (Messenger.GeneralModel.Msg tar msg (Messenger.Scene.Scene.SceneOutputMsg scenemsg userdata)), cmsgpacker ), Messenger.Base.Env cdata userdata )

name: Messenger.Misc.KeyCode
comment:
Common key codes

@docs arrowUp, arrowDown, arrowLeft, arrowRight, space, escape, enter, backspace, tab, shift, ctrl, alt, capsLock, mouseLeftButton, mouseMidButton, mouseRightButton

name: Messenger.Misc.RNG
comment:
# RNG module

Sample RNG module.

The seed is often given by the current tick.

@docs genRandomInt, genRandomListInt

values.name: genRandomInt
values.comment: Generate a random int in the range [a, b] using the given seed.

values.name: genRandomListInt
values.comment: Generate a random list of ints in the range [a, b] using the given seed.
values.type: Basics.Int -> Basics.Int -> ( Basics.Int, Basics.Int ) -> List.List Basics.Int
